resources.string: Lizinga lekushisa %1$s lehlele emkhawulweni wakho we%2$s
Secwayiso: Kunika emandla lenketho lengenhla kungakhipha ibhethri yakho ngekushesha kunalokuvamile
I-URL ye-Custom ayikho, noma ayikho lutfo. Ungangena etindzaweni tekwengeta i-URL yesiko
I-URL ye %1$s beyingenalutfo, sicela uhlole lifayela lakho le %2$s bese uyazama futsi
Kwehlulekile kuhlanganisa idatha ye %1$s nedatha ye %2$s
Kwehlulekile kucubungula kahle idatha yesimo selitulu kusuka kuseva yakho, ikakhulukati idatha ye %1$s
Luhlobo lwekubiketela ’%1$s’ alusebenti, hlola ifayela lakho letilungiselelo bese uyazama futsi
Le app ivuselelwe kepha iseva loyixhumana nayo ayikabuyeketi i-Inigo Plugin ye-weeWX. Emasimu angahle angaveli kahle kuze kube ngulapho weeWX avuselelwa
Sikhatsi sekuvuselela asisebenti, tilungiselelo tekuvuselela bese tiphindze tizame

I %1$s manje idzinga ifayela lemininingwane ye %2$s kusuka ku %3$s server, kufanele uvuselele i %4$s bese uvuselela lifayela le %5$s ngaphambi kwekutsi le-app isebente kahle. Chafata Kulungile kute utfole imininingwane leminyenti ku %6$s
Isethi yekuvuselela ngesandla, swipe refup screen kute ulayishe
Lizinga lekushisa %1$s likhuphukele emkhawulweni wakho we%2$s
Kute lokulandvwako noma lokusebenta lokungakabi kusetha
Tatiso tiyadzingeka kute tikucwayise uma lizinga lekushisa, imvula noma lizinga lemvula lihlangabetana nemikhawulo yakho lebekiwe
Njengobe wala imvume yesatiso kabili, kufanele uyivumele kumasethingi esikhundleni saloko, kwetfula emasethingi?
Sicela ulindze ngesikhatsi sicinisekisa i-URL loyifakile

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Kube neliphutsa le %1$d lelitfolakele ngesikhatsi kuvuselelwa, buka emalogi langu %2$s kute utfole imininingwane
Bekunemaphutsa langu %1$d latfolakala ngesikhatsi kuvuselelwa, buka emalogi langu %2$s kute utfole imininingwane

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Bekuneliphutsa le %1$d lelitfolakele kufayela le %2$s, buka lifayela le %2$s lelitfolakala ku %3$s noma buka emalogi e %4$s kute utfole imininingwane
Bekunemaphutsa langu %1$d latfolakala kufayela le %2$s, buka lifayela le %2$s lelitfolakala ku %3$s noma buka emalogi langu %4$s kute utfole imininingwane

resources.string: Radar uhlobo ’%1$s’ alusebenti, hlola ifayela lakho letilungiselelo bese uzama futsi
Radar URL ayikabeki. Ungaya kumasethingi kute ushintje
Ticwayiso onkhe malanga nangabe imvula ifika emkhawulweni wakho lobekiwe
Tecwayiso uma ngabe lizinga lemvula lendlula umkhawulo lomkhulu ngekuya ngesikhatsi semvula
Lizinga lemvula le %1$s ku %2$d %3$s yekugcina lifike esigabeni ’Lesimatima’
Tecwayiso uma ngabe lizinga lemvula lendlula umkhawulo wesecwayiso ngekuya ngesikhatsi semvula
Imvula lengu %1$s ku %2$d %3$s yekugcina seyifike esigabeni se ’Secwayiso’
Tecwayiso uma ngabe lizinga lemvula lendlula umkhawulo wekubuka ngekuya ngesikhatsi semvula
Lizinga lemvula le %1$s ku %2$d %3$s leyengcile lifike esigabeni se-’Watch’
Uciniseka kutsi ufuna kususa yonkhe idatha?
Ticwayiso letifika kabili ngelilanga uma lizinga lekushisa lifinyelela emikhawulweni yakho lebekiwe
Bese kuvuselelwa ngesandla, kepha kute lokucuketfwe lokugcinwe kwanyalo
I-URL beyibekwe kutsi ivele noma beyingenalutho
Akazange akwati kuxhumana nobe kulandza ku-URL yesiko lecacisiwe
Akazange akwati kuxhumana nobe kulandza lesibiketelo
Angizange ngikhone kuxhuma noma kulandza %1$s kusuka ku %2$s
Akazange akwati kuxhumana nobe kulandza i-radar= sitfombe kusuka ku-inthanethi
Akazange akwati kuxhumana nobe kulandza emasethingi kuseva yakho
Akazange akwati kuxhuma nobe kulandza sitfombe se-webcam kuseva yakho
